//: Footprint ceilings for the sidecar budget gate (#271). Mirrors the perf
//1: baseline: a metric ceiling of 0 opts out, an absent scenario is not gated.
//2: Numbers are runner-bound (binary size is deterministic; idle RSS is fairly
//3: stable; cold start varies with runner core count, so its ceiling is loose
//4: and only catches gross regressions). Ceilings carry headroom over the
//6: The image ceiling only applies when AWS2AZURE_FOOTPRINT_IMAGE is set; it
//7: stays 0 (silent passthrough) until a CI run captures the first number.
